name: Ravi Tarun Prasad Nimmalapudi
headline: Software Engineer specializing in backend systems, data engineering, and machine learning
summary: I am a software engineer with experience in backend development, data engineering, and applied machine learning. I have worked on building scalable systems, automating complex workflows, and developing data-driven solutions that solve real-world problems. My work combines strong engineering fundamentals with a focus on efficiency, scalability, and practical impact.
about: I am a software engineer specializing in backend systems, data engineering, and machine learning. I enjoy designing scalable architectures, building efficient data pipelines, and developing intelligent systems that solve real-world problems. My experience includes working with distributed systems, automation tools, and machine learning models across multiple projects and professional roles. I am particularly interested in leveraging data and backend engineering to create impactful and reliable software solutions.
